title: Title: PRIMES Premium Garlic Press Super Easy to Use & Clean Garlic Crusher & Mincer, Professional Kitchen Garlic Press, Easy-Squeeze, Ergonomic Handle, Silicone Garlic Peeler & Brush
features: CRUSH WITH EASE: Our garlic mincer features a large chamber, allowing you to crush multiple cloves at once effortlessly. No need to peel the cloves—keep your hands clean and odor-free with our garlic presser. Crush everything, even your enemies (if they're garlic cloves).

SPEND MORE TIME COOKING, LESS TIME CLEANING: Unlike your last garlic crusher, the Primes garlic crusher leaves less waste and is easy to clean. It's 100% dishwasher safe, keeping your kitchen tidy. If you want to smell like garlic, you'll have to buy Lynx garlic.

NEVER THROW AWAY GARLIC PRESS AGAIN: Backed by a Lifetime Guarantee, our garlic mincer is far superior to other inferior crushers. It's super strong and durable, built to withstand even the toughest crushing tasks.

LOOKS BEAUTIFUL IN YOUR KITCHEN: With its sleek, stainless-steel design, our garlic mincer not only feels great in your hand but also looks fantastic in your kitchen. Its elegant cardboard packaging makes it a perfect gift for anyone (except maybe vampires).

WE ARE A REAL BRITISH FAMILY: Cooking is at the heart of our home, and our kitchenware reflects this. Add a spice of fun to your family cooking (and with British cooking, you might need all the spice you can get!).
